zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Standish於1452年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，他的父親Ralph Standish28歲，母親Margaret Radcliffe27歲。他和Sibyl Bold至少有7個兒子和4個女兒。他於1482年被列為knight。他去世於1507年11月19日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Standish was born in 1452, in Standish, Lancashire, England, his father, Ralph Standish, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Radcliffe, was 27. He had at least 7 sons and 4 daughters with Sibyl Bold. In 1482, at the age of 30, his occupation is listed as knight. He died on 19 November 1507, in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Standish est né en 1452, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Standish, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Radcliffe, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles avec Sibyl Bold. En 1482, à l’âge de 30 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est knight. Il est décédé le 19 novembre 1507, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie con Sibyl Bold. Nel 1482, all'età di 30 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come knight. Morì il 19 novembre 1507, nel Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Standishが1452年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた時，父Ralph Standishは28歳，母Margaret Radcliffeは27歳であった。彼はSibyl Boldとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。1482年，30歳の時，職業はknightと記録されている。彼は1507年11月19日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Standish(이)가 1452년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Standish(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Radcliffe(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Sibyl Bold(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1482년, 30세의 나이로 그의 직업은 knight이었다. 그는 1507년 11월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.
